simplevoicechat:hotkey-toggle-talk: Simple Voice Chat: Toggle Continuous Talk

simplevoicechat:playback-debug-status: Playback: ctx={0} efx={1} streams={2} pending={3} jitter={4} albuf={5}

Current squad: {0}
Squad voice ignores distance limits.
simplevoicechat:chat-switched-mode: Simple Voice Chat: voice mode switched to {0}.
simplevoicechat:chat-device-switched: Simple Voice Chat: microphone input device switched to {0}.
simplevoicechat:chat-control-not-connect: Simple Voice Chat: control channel is not connected, cannot leave squad.
simplevoicechat:chat-requested-leave-squ: Simple Voice Chat: requested leaving current squad.
simplevoicechat:chat-control-not-connect: Simple Voice Chat: control channel is not connected, cannot disband squad.
simplevoicechat:chat-requested-disband-s: Simple Voice Chat: requested disbanding current squad.
simplevoicechat:chat-debug-recording-una: Simple Voice Chat: cannot start debug recording, microphone unavailable. {0}
simplevoicechat:chat-debug-recording-sta: Simple Voice Chat: started 3-second debug recording. It is processed and ADPCM-encoded locally, but not sent to the server.
simplevoicechat:chat-debug-recording-bus: Simple Voice Chat: debug recording is still in progress. Please wait until it finishes before playback.
simplevoicechat:chat-debug-recording-emp: Simple Voice Chat: no debug recording is available yet, or no microphone input exceeded the noise gate during recording.
simplevoicechat:chat-debug-playback-unin: Simple Voice Chat: playback service is not initialized, cannot play debug recording.
simplevoicechat:chat-debug-playback-star: Simple Voice Chat: started debug recording playback ({0} frames). It uses the game's OpenAL 3D scene and applies distance, occlusion, and underwater low-pass voice propagation.
simplevoicechat:chat-debug-recording-fin: Simple Voice Chat: debug recording finished, {0}
no sound exceeded the noise gate.
captured {0} frames. You can play them from the status window.
simplevoicechat:chat-debug-playback-fini: Simple Voice Chat: debug recording playback finished.
simplevoicechat:command-bind-face-player: Look at a nearby player, then type /svc bind.
simplevoicechat:command-request-bind-squ: Requested binding a squad voice channel with {0}.
simplevoicechat:command-request-leave-sq: Requested leaving the current squad voice channel.
simplevoicechat:command-set-volume-ok: Simple Voice Chat: playback volume set to {0}%.
simplevoicechat:server-status: SimpleVoiceChat enabled={0}, ranges whisper/talk/shout={1}/{2}/{3}, max={4}, squads={5}, adminMuted={6}, forceBlocked={7}
simplevoicechat:server-squad-disabled: Simple Voice Chat: squad channel is not enabled on this server.
simplevoicechat:server-player-only: Simple Voice Chat: this command can only be used by in-game players.
simplevoicechat:server-bind-instruction: Simple Voice Chat: face a player within {0} blocks and type /svc bind, or use /svc bind <player>.
simplevoicechat:server-left-squad: Simple Voice Chat: you left the squad voice channel.
simplevoicechat:server-no-voice-admin-pe: Simple Voice Chat: you do not have voice administration permission.
simplevoicechat:server-no-squad-to-disba: Simple Voice Chat: you do not have a squad to disband.
simplevoicechat:server-disbanded-squad-s: Simple Voice Chat: you disbanded the current squad voice channel.
simplevoicechat:server-disbanded-squad-o: Simple Voice Chat: {0} disbanded the current squad voice channel.
simplevoicechat:server-no-squad-bound: Simple Voice Chat: you do not currently have a bound squad voice channel.
simplevoicechat:server-squad-members: Simple Voice Chat: current squad members: {0}
simplevoicechat:server-no-bind-target: Simple Voice Chat: no valid player target was found to bind.
simplevoicechat:server-bind-target-too-f: Simple Voice Chat: target is too far away; binding requires facing them within {0} blocks.
simplevoicechat:server-bound-with-you: Simple Voice Chat: {0} bound a squad voice channel with you.
simplevoicechat:server-bound-squad: Simple Voice Chat: bound a squad voice channel with {0}.
simplevoicechat:server-no-server-control: Simple Voice Chat: you do not have server voice management permission.
simplevoicechat:server-adminmuted: SimpleVoiceChat: {0} was globally muted by an administrator.
simplevoicechat:server-adminunmuted: SimpleVoiceChat: {0} is no longer globally muted by an administrator.
simplevoicechat:server-forceblocked: SimpleVoiceChat: {0} was force-blocked by an administrator. Nobody on the server will hear them.
simplevoicechat:server-unforceblocked: SimpleVoiceChat: {0} is no longer force-blocked by an administrator.
